title: ladanum ochroleucum
intro: Ladanum ochroleucum, also known as white ladan or white ladanum, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, specifically in the mountainous areas of Greece and Turkey. The plant contains a resinous sap, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ladanum ochroleucum include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting healing. In herbal preparations, the resin is often used in topical ointments, salves, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
